name: Zip Co Limited..
analysis: ZIP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 43% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.7300. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.8300, stop A$2.1681, target A$3.4000 (0.86:1) — then trail it.
